_meta.policy: Premium currency + one subscription tier only. Never units, tiles, or power. $/Shard improves with size (bulk convenience, not advantage).

notes.consumableGrant: shards field is server-authoritative — the Worker returns it on receipt validation; the client credits the returned amount.
notes.cosmetics: Cosmetic shop SKUs are priced in in-game currency (Stone or Shards), not StoreKit products, so they are NOT listed here.
notes.valueMonotonicity: shardPacks must be ordered by ascending usd, and usd/shards must strictly decrease (better value at higher tiers).
